criteria.notes: Extensively uses @amsterdam/design-system-react: Page, PageHeader, PageFooter, Grid, Grid.Cell, Column, Heading, Paragraph, Button, Field, Label, TextInput, ErrorMessage, Hint.
Uses --ams-* tokens in index.css (--ams-space-l, --ams-space-s, --ams-typography-body-text-bold-font-weight) and imports tokens CSS.
Uses Grid and Grid.Cell with span={{ narrow: 4, medium: 8, wide: 9 }} and span={{ narrow: 4, medium: 8, wide: 3 }} totaling 12 columns on wide.
Uses PageHeader with brandName/logoLink and PageFooter with PageFooter.Menu and PageFooter.MenuLink components.
Newsletter form uses ADS components: Field, Label, TextInput, ErrorMessage, Hint, and Button.
No banned libraries present; only @amsterdam/design-system-* and react-router-dom used.
All user-facing text is written in Dutch including headings, paragraphs, form labels, and navigation.
Text uses short, clear sentences with common words; formal 'u' form consistently applied, suitable for B1 reading level.
Each of the 3 pages has exactly 5 Paragraph components with substantive content.
References real Zuidas projects: Zuidasdok, station Amsterdam Zuid, A10 tunnel, Gustav Mahlerlaan, Ravel woonproject.
Consistent professional, informative tone across all pages with formal 'u' address throughout.
Three routed pages via React Router: / (overview), /projecten (projects), /leefbaarheid (living).
NewsletterForm component with email validation and success feedback is included on every page.
NavLink-based navigation sidebar with active state styling connects all three pages.
